pi_items.source: Confirmed via setup_hec_ras.sh which creates this directory and copies the Muncie example into it.
HDF5 inspection of the simulation results for the most upstream cross-section (RS 15696.24) showed a minimum WSE of 950.80, contradicting the 800 value. The verifier uses 700.
HDF5 inspection of the simulation results for the most upstream cross-section (RS 15696.24) showed a maximum WSE of 955.42, contradicting the 1000 value. The verifier uses 1200.
Confirmed via verifier.py logic which requires 'valid_values >= 10' to pass (although actual data has 289 rows).

privileged_info_summary: The Muncie project data is a real-world example from the USACE HEC-RAS 6.6 software distribution. The most upstream cross-section in the simulation has a River Station of '15696.24'. A successful simulation output contains 289 rows of hydraulic time-series data for this cross-section. The valid Flow values range from 13500 to 21000 cfs, and the valid Water Surface Elevation (WSE) values range from approximately 950.80 to 955.42. The task requires creating 'rating_curve_data.csv', 'rating_curve.png', 'rating_curve_report.txt', and 'cross_sections.txt' in the results directory.
